responsibleGambling.title: Responsible gambling comes first
responsibleGambling.subtitle: Gambling should be entertainment, not a way to make money.
responsibleGambling.intro: If gambling stops being fun, it's time to take a break. Set limits, take regular breaks, and never chase losses.
signs: Spending more time or money than you intended
Chasing losses to win money back
Gambling to escape stress or low mood
Borrowing money or neglecting responsibilities to gamble
responsibleGambling.helpText: Free, confidential support is available. If you or someone you know needs help, reach out to a support organisation in your country.
responsibleGambling.reminder: Gambling is not a solution to financial problems.

items.a: No. GambleZone is an independent comparison site. We do not accept bets, hold balances or process gambling payments.
We may earn a commission when you visit an operator through our links. This never affects our editorial ratings, which follow a transparent methodology.
We only feature operators whose licensing we consider verifiable for the selected market. Always confirm availability in your own region.

items.q: Is the data on this site real?
items.a: This MVP uses clearly labelled sample data for demonstration. No real bonuses, licences or affiliate links are implied.

footer.about: GambleZone is an independent catalogue and comparison of licensed online casinos, with transparent information about bonuses, conditions and risks. We are not a casino.
footer.ageWarning: You must be 18 or older to gamble. Gambling can be addictive — please play responsibly.
footer.disclaimer: This site uses sample data for demonstration purposes only.

methodology.title: How we rate casinos
methodology.intro: Our ratings are built on a transparent, weighted methodology. We apply the same criteria to every operator, and sponsored placements never change an editorial score.
process: We collect verifiable facts about each operator.
We score each of the seven criteria independently.
We combine the weighted scores into an editorial score.
We re-review operators regularly and record the review date.
We clearly label any sponsored placement.

responsibleGambling.title: Responsible gambling
responsibleGambling.intro: Gambling should always be fun and never a way to make money. This page explains the risks, warning signs and tools that can help you stay in control.

affiliate.title: Affiliate disclosure
affiliate.body: GambleZone is reader-supported. When you click a link marked as sponsored and visit an operator, we may earn a commission at no additional cost to you. These commissions help us keep the site free. Affiliate relationships never influence our editorial ratings, which follow the transparent methodology described on our How we rate page. We only feature operators we consider suitable for the selected market.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: This is a demonstration MVP. In a production release this page would explain what data we collect, why we collect it, the legal basis, how long we keep it, and your rights. We are committed to collecting the minimum data necessary and never storing sensitive personal information in analytics or affiliate links.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.body: This demonstration MVP does not set marketing cookies without consent. A production release would list each cookie, its purpose and duration, and provide granular consent controls. Only strictly necessary mechanisms run before you give consent.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.body: This is a demonstration MVP. A production release would set out the terms governing your use of the site, including acceptable use, intellectual property, disclaimers, limitation of liability and the governing law. The information provided is for general guidance only and does not constitute legal or financial advice.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Spotted an inaccuracy or want to report a problem with an offer? Let us know. This demo form does not send or store any data.
contact.success: Thanks! (Demo only — no message was sent.)

about.title: Built by industry insiders, for players
about.lead: At GambleZone, we're more than just another gambling website — we're gamblers ourselves.
paragraphs: Our team consists of passionate players with over 10 years of experience working inside the gambling industry. Throughout our careers as Product Managers, Product Owners and Key Account Managers, we've seen how the industry operates behind the scenes. We've learned what creates a great player experience, and we've also seen the practices that can damage trust.

Our goal is simple: build a platform that puts players first. Every casino, sportsbook and promotion we feature is carefully evaluated based on quality, reliability, player experience and overall value — not on empty marketing promises.
We know what players expect because we are players too. We understand the excitement of a big win, the frustration of poor customer support, and the importance of choosing a trustworthy operator.
Whether you're looking for honest reviews, exclusive offers or the best places to play, GambleZone is committed to helping you make informed decisions with confidence.
about.closing: Welcome to GambleZone — created by industry professionals, built for gamblers.
